samples.text: People sleep at night to rest. Is this expected based on common sense?
Humans sleep during the night to recover. Does this match everyday common sense?
Individuals slumber at night to rest. Is this expected based on common sense?
Rest requires sleep. People sleep at night to obtain that rest. Is the described situation expected based on common sense?
People sleep at night to rest. The meeting started at noon. Is this expected based on common sense?
